2606.14688.title: Flood and Harvest: The Provable Necessity of Trivia for Generating Valuable Mathematics via the Lens of Language Generation in the Limit
2606.14688.paper_summary: AI systems coupled to proof assistants now generate formal mathematics at scale, and the gap between what a checker can verify and what a mathematician would value has become the binding constraint. We model the generation of valuable mathematics as nested language generation in the limit: a verifiable formal language $F$, accessed through a membership oracle (the proof checker), contains an unknown valuable language $H \in \mathcal{H}$ revealed only through an adversarial enumeration of a core $C \subseteq H$ of exact density $α$ (the literature). Every output is valuable ($\in H$), trivial ($\in F \setminus H$), or a hallucination ($\notin F$). We settle four questions. First, the verifier is not taste: the collections admitting generation with breadth are exactly those of the oracle-free model, characterized fiber-wise by Angluin's condition. Second, the verifier does buy sound coverage, covering all unseen valuable statements while asserting only valid ones: possible with it, impossible without it; it relocates unavoidable errors from false to trivial. Third, and centrally, a sharp dichotomy on the tight family: generators emitting finitely many trivia achieve optimal coverage $α/2$, while any infinite trivia allowance, even at vanishing rate, jumps the optimum to $1-α/2$ (both tight, for cores presented as the candidate intersection), and one generator attains both ends. The transition is in trivia count, not rate; the gap $1-α$ is the unrecorded mass. Fourth, both regimes instantiate in a compression model of mathematics. A perfect verifier cannot substitute for taste: the unbounded stream of correct-but-worthless statements is not an engineering accident but a provable necessity, since covering unrecorded valuable mathematics requires an infinite, but asymptotically negligible, stream of certified trivia.
2606.14688.paper_summary_zh: AI 系統與證明助手結合，現在能夠大規模生成形式數學，而檢查者能夠驗證的內容與數學家所重視的內容之間的差距已成為束縛約束。我們將有價值的數學生成建模為極限中的嵌套語言生成：一種可驗證的形式語言 $F$，通過一個成員預言機（證明檢查器）訪問，包含一種未知的有價值語言 $H \in \mathcal{H}$，僅通過對核心 $C \subseteq H$ 的對抗性枚舉來揭示，該核心的精確密度為 $α$（文獻）。每個輸出都是有價值的（$\in H$）、微不足道的（$\in F \setminus H$）或幻覺（$\notin F$）。我們解決了四個問題。首先，驗證者不是品味：允許廣度生成的集合恰好是無預言機模型的那些，按纖維方式由 Angluin 的條件特徵化。第二，驗證者確實購買了健全的覆蓋，覆蓋所有未見的有價值陳述，同時僅聲明有效的陳述：有它則可能，沒有它則不可能；它將無法避免的錯誤從虛假轉移到微不足道。第三，並且在中心上，對於緊密家族的尖銳二分法：發出有限多個微不足道的生成器達到最佳覆蓋 $α/2$，而任何無限的微不足道允許，即使在消失率下，將最佳值跳升至 $1-α/2$（兩者緊密，對於作為候選交集呈現的核心），且一個生成器達到兩端。轉變發生在微不足道的數量上，而不是速率上；差距 $1-α$ 是未記錄的質量。第四，兩種模式在數學的壓縮模型中體現。完美的驗證者無法替代品味：無限流的正確但無價值的陳述不是工程事故，而是可證明的必要性，因為覆蓋未記錄的有價值數學需要一個無限但漸近可忽略的經過認證的微不足道流。
2606.14688.author: Xiaoyu Li et.al.
2606.14688.authors: Xiaoyu Li, Andi Han, Dai Shi, Zheng Gao, Jiaojiao Jiang, Junbin Gao
